recommendations.title: Something the Lord Made
recommendations.overview: A dramatization of the relationship between heart surgery pioneers Alfred Blalock and Vivien Thomas.

recommendations.title: White Lightning
recommendations.overview: An ex-con teams up with federal agents to help them with breaking up a moonshine ring.

recommendations.title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three
recommendations.overview: In New York, armed men hijack a subway car and demand a ransom for the passengers while the authorities question about the method of their escape.

recommendations.title: Colossus: The Forbin Project
recommendations.overview: The U.S. has handed over control of its nuclear defense system to the Colossus supercomputer designed by scientist Dr. Charles Forbin. It soon becomes clear, that the now-sentient Colossus is far more intelligent than its creator realized—with the fa

recommendations.title: Jaws
recommendations.overview: When the seaside community of Amity finds itself under attack by a dangerous great white shark, the town's chief of police, a young marine biologist, and a grizzled shark hunter embark on a desperate quest to kill the beast before it strikes again.

recommendations.title: The Reef
recommendations.overview: A great white shark hunts the crew of a capsized sailboat along the Great Barrier Reef.

recommendations.title: Bait
recommendations.overview: A freak tsunami traps shoppers at a coastal Australian supermarket inside the building ... along with a 12-foot great white shark.

recommendations.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
recommendations.overview: The harrowing true story of the crew of the USS Indianapolis, who were stranded in the Philippine Sea for five days after delivering the atomic weapons that would eventually end WWII. As they awaited rescue, they endured extreme thirst, hunger, and r

recommendations.title: New Jack City
recommendations.overview: A gangster, Nino, is in the Cash Money Brothers, making a million dollars every week selling crack. A cop, Scotty, discovers that the only way to infiltrate the gang is to become a dealer himself.

recommendations.title: The Evil Next Door
recommendations.overview: A dad moves into a new house with his son and girlfriend. When he's out of town working, the son makes a new "friend" next doors.
